name: Escape the Dungeon
description: The dungeon is collapsing. You have limited time to find the exit and escape with your lives.

objectives.description: All heroes must reach the exit tile

introText: The ground shakes. Strahd's magic is tearing this place apart. Find the exit before you are buried alive!
victoryText: You burst into the cool night air just as the entrance collapses behind you. You are free!
defeatText: The ceiling gives way. The dungeon becomes your tomb.
